query:
-- Customers currently tagged retail_offering but have NO Site Bundle billing item (incorrectly tagged)
SELECT COUNT(*) as incorrectly_tagged
FROM customers c
WHERE c.customerType = 'retail_offering'
AND c.externalId NOT IN (
  SELECT DISTINCT customerExternalId FROM billing_items
  WHERE description LIKE '%Site Bundle%'
  AND customerExternalId IS NOT NULL AND customerExternalId != ''
);
